laws.title: Logo Visibility
laws.description: Ensure the Google logo is highly visible and not obstructed by other elements.
laws.remediation: Adjust z-index or positioning if the logo overlaps with other components.

laws.title: Consistent Color Palette
laws.description: Maintain a consistent use of colors matching Google's primary color scheme.
laws.remediation: Review CSS styles to ensure all elements adhere to the defined color tokens.

laws.title: Button Shape Consistency
laws.description: Ensure all buttons have a uniform shape and style across the site.
laws.remediation: Use a centralized style guide for button components and apply globally.

laws.title: Spacing and Padding
laws.description: Ensure consistent spacing and padding between elements for a balanced layout.
laws.remediation: Use a grid system or design tokens to standardize spacing throughout.

laws.title: Typography Hierarchy
laws.description: Implement a clear hierarchy in text styles to enhance readability.
laws.remediation: Define and use heading, subheading, and body text styles consistently.
